Levels:
What is this data? Each point on the map is someone who used FreeMoCap and chose to share anonymous usage data. We use their IP address to estimate their location (via ip-api.com).

Important notes: This undercounts actual users—people who turned off sharing aren't included, and multiple people at universities or offices often share one IP address. VPNs can also make locations inaccurate.

Total Users Over Time

Running total of all users who have used FreeMoCap

New Users Each Day

Dots = daily, bands = weekly (dark) and monthly (light) averages ± 1 SD

Total Activity Over Time

Running total of all pings from all users

Daily Activity

Dots = daily, bands = weekly (dark) and monthly (light) averages ± 1 SD

How Often Do Users Return?

Each dot = users who checked in X times. Colors match the categories on the right.

Types of Users

Users grouped by how often they check in

What Time of Day?

Activity by hour (in UTC/GMT timezone)

Which Days Are Busiest?

Total activity by day of the week

million people (try 0.5)
100 km² (try 12)

Where Are Our Users?

Total users in each country

Users per Million People

Adjusts for country population size ⓘ

Users by Country Size

Users per 100,000 km² of land ⓘ
